debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
M : Set β
hM : @Graph.IsMatching α β G M
⊢ M.encard ≤ @Graph.MatchingNumber α β G

failed_attempts: refine le_csSup ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact Set.empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exact (Set.disjoint_empty_left _).symm
  , rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty e he⟩, rfl⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
refine le_csSup ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty e he⟩, rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty e he⟩, rfl⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact Set.empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exact (Set.disjoint_empty_left _).le_bot
  , rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

rw [MatchingNumber]
  apply le_csSup
  · exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
  · exact Set.nonempty_of_mem ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty e he⟩, rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact Set.empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exact disjoint_empty _
    , rfl⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact Set.empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exfalso
      exact Set.not_mem_empty e he⟩, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by simp [IsMatching]⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩

apply le_csSup ⟨0, ⟨∅, by
    constructor
    · exact Set.empty_subset _
    · intro e he f hf hne
      exact (Set.disjoint_empty_left _).mp (by contradiction)
    , by simp⟩⟩
  exact ⟨M, hM, rfl⟩
